title: pteridrys triangularis
intro: Pteridrys triangularis, also known as the triangular fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. The medicinal properties of Pteridrys triangularis include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Pteridrys triangularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions.
